Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS CSRWARE, INC. AND KAREN ALONARDO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION.

APPEARANCES: Wendy E. Musell, Esq. of Stewart & Musell 593-0083 for pltfs & opposing parties; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS MADE A SUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THE MULTI-FACTOR TEST TO GUESS THEIR CLAIM OF WAIVER HAS BEEN MET, INCLUDING PREJUDICE TO THE PLAINTIFF DUE TO THE DELAY. (ST. AGNES MEDICAL CENTER V. PACIFICARE OF CALIFORNIA (2003) 31 CAL.4TH 1187) Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
